title: Oh My Heart Is Sad And Weary
content:
'Oh my heart is sad and weary
        Everywhere I roam,
        Longing for the old plantation
        And for the old folks at home.'
meaning:
Louisa May Alcott's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Oh My Heart Is Sad And Weary"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
